questions.title: Packaging waste
questions.question: Customers complain about packaging waste. What should your company do?

questions.title: Cloud provider choice
questions.question: You need to choose a cloud provider for a new application.

choices.text: Choose a provider that uses renewable energy
Choose a local provider to keep data in your country

questions.title: Factory location
questions.question: Your company needs to choose where to produce its products. You must decide between different factory locations.

choices.text: Use a factory in Eastern Europe

questions.title: AI delivery planning
questions.question: You want to use AI to improve delivery planning. You must decide where to run the system.

choices.text: Run the AI locally on your own servers

questions.title: Goods transport
questions.question: You need to organize how goods are transported between warehouses.

questions.title: Data center cooling strategy
questions.question: Your data center consumes a lot of energy and produces significant heat. Which cooling strategy should you choose?

choices.text: Liquid cooling system with waste heat recovery for the city

questions.title: IT infrastructure expansion
questions.question: You need to expand your IT infrastructure.

questions.title: Employee work policy
questions.question: You need to define the company work policy.

questions.title: Office hardware replacement
questions.question: You need to replace office hardware.

questions.title: Energy supplier
questions.question: Your company must choose an energy supplier.

questions.title: Cybersecurity investment
questions.question: You need to decide how much to invest in cybersecurity.

questions.title: Cyberattack response
questions.question: Your company is hit by a cyberattack that disrupts operations.

questions.title: Historical data storage
questions.question: Your servers are almost full because your company keeps all historical data.

choices.text: Buy more storage and keep everything

questions.title: Supplier choice
questions.question: A supplier is very cheap but not environmentally friendly.

choices.text: Work with the supplier to improve

questions.title: New office location
questions.question: You need to open a new office for a growing team.

choices.text: Open the office in the city center, with easy access but higher rent
Open the office in a suburban area, cheaper but requiring more commuting

questions.title: Marketing campaign
questions.question: The marketing team wants to launch a promotional campaign.

choices.text: Use a limited eco-designed print campaign combined with digital communication

questions.title: Devices left on at night
questions.question: Many company devices remain on during the night.

choices.text: Ask employees to turn off devices

questions.title: Printing policy
questions.question: Employees print too many documents.

choices.text: Set double-sided black-and-white printing by default
Require digital documents for internal meetings

questions.title: Software hosting architecture
questions.question: You need to choose the software hosting architecture.

questions.title: Data backup strategy
questions.question: You need to choose a data backup strategy.

questions.title: Office heating costs
questions.question: Energy prices are rising, and heating your offices is becoming very expensive.

choices.text: Maintain heating and absorb the extra cost
Reduce heating and risk employee dissatisfaction
Reduce office usage and rely more on remote work
Invest in building improvements such as insulation and smart systems

questions.title: Cycling support
questions.question: Employees ask for better cycling support.

choices.text: Do nothing because few employees currently cycle

questions.title: Commuting reimbursement policy
questions.question: The company wants to update its commuting reimbursement policy.

choices.text: Increase reimbursement for employees using public transport
Increase fuel reimbursement for employees driving alone
Offer the same fixed transport bonus to everyone

questions.title: Product returns
questions.question: Customers are returning more products, increasing transport and waste.

choices.text: Improve product quality to reduce returns

questions.title: Video conferencing policy
questions.question: You need to define the company video conferencing policy.

questions.title: Investor profitability pressure
questions.question: Investors demand higher profitability this quarter.

questions.title: Software update policy
questions.question: You need to decide how frequently systems are updated.

choices.text: Frequent updates, always using the latest versions

questions.title: Logging and monitoring strategy
questions.question: Your systems generate large amounts of logs. You need to choose a logging and monitoring strategy.

choices.text: Keep logs for a limited time
Use intelligent log filtering and compression

questions.title: Device lifecycle policy
questions.question: Employees request frequent device upgrades. You need to define a device lifecycle policy.

questions.title: API design strategy
questions.question: Your services expose APIs to partners. You need to define an API design strategy.

choices.text: No optimization with large data payloads

questions.title: Testing environment management
questions.question: You need to manage environments for development and testing.

choices.text: Scheduled environments with on and off periods

questions.title: Office cooling and heating
questions.question: Your office energy consumption is rising. How should you improve cooling and heating?

questions.title: Network traffic optimization
questions.question: Your applications generate large amounts of unnecessary data traffic. What should you do?

choices.text: Redesign the system to minimize data transfer

questions.title: Bring your own device policy
questions.question: Employees want to use personal devices for work. You need to define a BYOD policy.

choices.text: Allow employees to bring their own devices

questions.title: AI usage governance
questions.question: Employees are increasingly using external AI tools for work tasks. How should usage be governed?

questions.title: Green software engineering training
questions.question: Your developers are not trained in energy-efficient coding practices. What training policy should you adopt?

questions.title: Third-party API usage
questions.question: Your system depends heavily on external APIs. You need to define an API dependency strategy.

choices.text: Replace critical APIs with internal solutions

questions.title: Product replacement frequency
questions.question: Your products are replaced frequently, generating waste and increasing production costs. What should your company do?

choices.text: Offer a repair or refurbishment service

questions.title: Technical debt management
questions.question: Your systems are becoming harder to maintain, causing inefficiencies and increasing energy usage. How should you manage technical debt?

choices.text: Ignore technical debt and continue operations

outcomes.text: A cyberattack targets your company, but your security systems detect it early since you invested in good cybersecurity.
A cyberattack hits your company and manages to disrupt several systems before being stopped.. No major data is lost, but the incident slows down operations and you loose some money.
A cyberattack spreads across your systems without being detected in time since you didn’t invest in cybersecurity. The company struggles to recover, leading financial damage
